message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "risk_area": "operational",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Undefined requirements for custom programming",
      "rationale": "The lack of defined requirements can lead to project delays, increased costs, and failure to meet business needs.",
      "mitigation": "Establish a clear requirements gathering process with defined timelines and responsibilities before commencing development.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "3.2",
      "source_clause_id": "cc0c137b-a56f-47db-b2e9-59ec065485aa",
      "source_excerpt": "The requirements to be fulfilled by the custom programming to the above listed packages are presently undefined.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "commercial",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Payment structure tied to undefined performance metrics",
      "rationale": "Payments are contingent on undefined performance metrics, which may lead to disputes over payment and acceptance.",
      "mitigation": "Define clear performance metrics and acceptance criteria in the contract to avoid ambiguity.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.11",
      "source_clause_id": "f5e0cb07-9c1b-481d-9b70-9bed8869e675",
      "source_excerpt": "Upon passing the acceptance test, Company shall pay to Developer an additional ……. [insert number] % of the price of the phase.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "enforcement",
      "severity": "high",
      "issue": "Cancellation rights due to delivery failures",
      "rationale": "The contract allows for cancellation if the Developer fails to deliver on time, which could lead to significant project disruptions.",
      "mitigation": "Implement a robust project management framework to monitor progress and address issues proactively.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.9",
      "source_clause_id": "1d3092a3-4144-4005-a6d7-edb54adbe06f",
      "source_excerpt": "In the event that Developer fails to deliver the completed programs ………..[insert number] months after the original delivery date, and the delivery date was not modified, Company may cancel that Phase Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "risk_area": "legal",
      "severity": "medium",
      "issue": "Ambiguity in acceptance testing procedures",
      "rationale": "Unclear acceptance testing procedures can lead to disputes regarding whether the software meets contractual obligations.",
      "mitigation": "Clearly outline acceptance testing procedures and criteria in the contract to ensure mutual understanding.",
      "source_page": 1,
      "source_section": "4.12",
      "source_clause_id": "65a8de99-bd28-4e5d-97f4-ca189e42ae59",
      "source_excerpt": "If the programs fail to perfom the acceptance tests, the parties shall follow this procedure: a) Company shall immediately notify Developer by telephone of the failure of the test.",
      "confidence": 0.70
    }
  ]
}
